prompt:
Goal: editorial illustration for a programming textbook
Scene: A horizontal pipeline flowing left to right with four major stages connected by conveyor belts. Stage 1 "src/": a folder of TypeScript source files (.ts) on the left, neatly organized. Stage 2 "tsc compile": the files pass through a compiler machine that transforms them, type-checking along the way (green checkmarks pop up). Stage 3 "test": the compiled output runs through a testing station with Vitest branding, showing all tests passing on a results board. Stage 4 "dist/": the final production-ready files (.js, .d.ts) are packaged into a clean output folder with a "ready to ship" stamp and a small rocket icon. A progress bar at the bottom shows the pipeline completing from 0% to 100%.
Style: Head First book illustration style, clean lines, slightly whimsical and humorous, warm colors, educational
Aspect ratio: 16:9
Background: white
Text in image: minimal or none
Avoid: photorealistic, dark, scary, complex UI screenshots
